value: I am a dedicated and versatile professional specializing in artificial intelligence engineering, visual computing, full-stack development, and software engineering. I actively work in these fields, contributing to innovative projects and conducting research focused on deep learning and visual computing. With a strong academic foundation in computer science and hands-on experience in cutting-edge technologies, I aim to tackle complex challenges and create impactful solutions. My work bridges the gap between machine learning and human-centered design, combining technical expertise with creativity to drive advancements in artificial intelligence and software development.
